name: Chiles Rellenos Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Whole green chili peppers (7 oz.)
3 cups Shredded Sharp Cheddar cheese (approx. 12 oz.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the chili peppers lengthwise and remove seeds and pith. Place them in a greased 9x13-inch baking dish.
2. Sprinkle Cheddar cheese, green onions, and 1-1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese over the chilies.
3. In a bowl, beat eggs, milk, flour, and salt together until smooth. Pour over the chilies and cheese.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 325 degrees for 50 minutes or until a knife inserted in the custard comes out clean.
5. Meanwhile, mix the remaining salsa with the other 1-1/2 cups of mozzarella cheese. Sprinkle over the casserole.
6. Return to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes or until the cheese melts.
7. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
Per Serving: 33 grams protein, 22 grams carbohydrate, 271 milligrams cholesterol, 490 calories.
